West Bengal: Suvendu govt announces Rs 5 fish-rice meals, liquor ban near schools and temples
description: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari unveiled significant welfare initiatives, including subsidised fish-rice meals for Rs 5 at 400 canteens and Rs 3,000 monthly financial aid for women under the Annapurna Yojana. New regulations will restrict liquor shops within a kilometre of educational and religious sites, reinforcing a commitment to the rule of law over personal rule.

PMAY-U CLSS explained: How those earning under Rs 18 lakh can cut home loan costs
description: Middle-income families dreaming of homeownership can find relief through the Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS) under PMAY-Urban. Launched in 2017, it offers interest subsidies on home loans for eligible households earning between Rs 6 lakh and Rs 18 lakh annually. The scheme aims to make housing more affordable by reducing EMIs.

description: Bollywood actor Ranveer Singh visited the Chamundeshwari Temple atop Chamundi Hills on Tuesday morning to offer prayers. He entered the temple around 7:30 am as a common devotee, spending about 10 minutes inside. This visit followed a Karnataka High Court directive in connection with the 'Kantara' mimicry case.

description: The IPL 2026 playoffs begin with Qualifier 1 featuring defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru against Gujarat Titans. The Powerplay overs are expected to be crucial in deciding the outcome of this high-stakes encounter.

Diarrhoea and constipation at the same time? Doc explains
description: Confusing bowel changes, like watery diarrhoea following days of constipation, could signal a serious health issue, warns top gastroenterologist. This 'overflow diarrhoea' occurs when hard stool blocks the colon, allowing only water to pass. Persistent symptoms, especially with abdominal pain or weight loss, require immediate medical evaluation, as colon cancer can also present this way.

title: Wave of resignations hits TMC strongholds in West Bengal
description: Bengal's civic bodies are facing collapse due to widespread resignations, even within Trinamool strongholds, signaling internal party strain.  Recent mass departures in North Barrackpore, Diamond Harbour, and Contai have destabilized numerous municipalities.  Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has appealed for unity amidst this growing unrest.

title: Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: 'We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system'
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

title: From ‘madhushaala’ charge to governance wars: Behind Centre’s dramatic move on Delhi Gymkhana
description: The Centre has ordered the Delhi Gymkhana Club (DGC) to vacate its premises, marking the culmination of a six-year governance dispute. This move follows a probe into mismanagement and violations, surprising members who were recently asked to pay significant dues. The club, a symbol of elitism, has faced controversies over membership rules and factionalism.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
description: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.
